response.overview: After killing a man under the orders of a mysterious criminal organisation, Gina waits alone in a bloodstained apartment for a cleaner who never arrives. As the hours drag on, paranoia, guilt, and the threat of betrayal begin to close in around her. Trapped between the consequences of her actions and the people who orchestrated them, Gina must confront the terrifying reality that she was never meant to escape. A tense and darkly ironic crime thriller about manipulation, accountability, and survival.
response.title: GINA
